reviews.review_description: Ride&Slash: Revenge of Salur is one of the most immersive VR games I’ve ever played! I truly felt like I was in the middle of Salur’s epic journey. The graphics, the details, and the overall atmosphere of the game are outstanding. The sword fighting and strategic defense mechanics require real skill, adding depth to the gameplay. It’s both challenging and fun! You really feel like a knight in battle. I highly recommend it—it’s rare to find such an adventure experience in VR. 5/5!”
